testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Cart badge should increment. Before: 1, After: 1 expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Cart badge should increment. Before: 1, After: 1 expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.AddToCartSteps.cart_badge_count_increments(AddToCartSteps.java:183) at ✽.the cart badge count increments(classpath:features/AddToCart.feature:36)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: All product prices should contain the symbol: BHD expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: All product prices should contain the symbol: BHD expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CountryCurrencySteps.all_prices_show_symbol(CountryCurrencySteps.java:107) at ✽.all product prices show the "BHD" currency symbol(classpath:features/CountryCurrency.feature:26)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: All visible product prices should contain: BHD expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: All visible product prices should contain: BHD expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepdefinitions.CountryCurrencySteps.all_visible_prices_contain_symbol(CountryCurrencySteps.java:126) at ✽.all visible product prices contain the "BHD" currency symbol(classpath:features/CountryCurrency.feature:38)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Cart badge should increment. Before: 1, After: 1 expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Cart badge should increment.
